tasks.subject: Task 1: Add routine-session to channel type enum + migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the schema change. Database, drizzle metadata, and TypeScript schema all carry the new enum value.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/channels.ts:29-36
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/0040_routine_session_channel_type.sql
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/meta/_journal.json
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/meta/0040_snapshot.json

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/database db:migrate && psql output includes routine-session

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/channels.ts","apps/server/libs/database/migrations/0040_routine_session_channel_type.sql"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @team9/database db:migrate","acceptanceCriteria":["channelTypeEnum contains routine-session","migration applies cleanly","psql enum_range includes routine-session"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ChannelsService.createRoutineSessionChannel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the channel-creation primitive used by every routine-session purpose.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts (extend type union + new method)
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test channels.service.spec.ts -t createRoutineSessionChannel

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test channels.service.spec.ts -t createRoutineSessionChannel","acceptanceCriteria":["insert with type routine-session","propertySettings carries purpose+routineId","two members added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ChannelsService.hardDeleteRoutineSessionChannel with audit cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hard delete a routine-session channel safely; pre-cleans im_audit_logs inside a single transaction.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test channels.service.spec.ts -t hardDeleteRoutineSessionChannel

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test channels.service.spec.ts -t hardDeleteRoutineSessionChannel","acceptanceCriteria":["NotFoundException when missing","ForbiddenException when type wrong","audit logs deleted before channel inside transaction","redis cache invalidated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RoutinesService.startCreationSession (lazy materialization)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New service method materializes a creation channel + sends kickoff event for an existing draft. Idempotent.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t startCreationSession

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t startCreationSession","acceptanceCriteria":["validates draft+creator+bot agentId","idempotent when channel already set","creates channel+session+event","rolls back channel on failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Refactor createWithCreationTask to compose create + startCreationSession
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single source of truth. createWithCreationTask becomes thin wrapper.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts:849-992
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t createWithCreationTask

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t createWithCreationTask","acceptanceCriteria":["no createDirectChannel reference","calls create then startCreationSession","rollback deletes draft on session failure","response shape unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire completeCreation to archive + delete to hard-delete
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reverse Phase 1 negation. Archive on complete, hard-delete on draft delete.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts:278-309 (delete) and :764-845 (completeCreation)
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t completeCreation routines.service.spec.ts -t delete

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/routines/routines.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter gateway test routines.service.spec.ts -t completeCreation","acceptanceCriteria":["completeCreation calls archiveCreationChannel","archive failure non-fatal","delete draft calls hardDeleteRoutineSessionChannel","non-draft delete unchanged"]}
```
